top_signals.title: Fed Hike Bets Mount Ahead of CPI Data, Warsh Hearing
top_signals.summary: Bond traders ramped up bets for a July interest-rate hike ahead of US inflation data and an appearance by the head of the Federal Reserve that stand to reinforce the need for action. Bloomberg's Ven Ram reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
top_signals.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
top_signals.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
top_signals.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with TS Banking Group, Inc. and TS Contrarian Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with TS Banking Group, Inc. and TS Contrarian Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cook, Welcome Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech At the State of Small Business Symposium hosted by the Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland (via pre-recorded video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
top_signals.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Building-Products Distributor QXO Launches Hostile Bid for Beacon
top_signals.summary: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: U.S. Stocks Fall as AI Selloff, Oil Jump Rattle Markets - WSJ
top_signals.summary: U.S. Stocks Fall as AI Selloff, Oil Jump Rattle Markets  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
top_signals.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bloomberg Retracts Singapore Property Story After Court Order
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg News retracted a story about property transactions in Singapore originally published on Dec. 12, 2024 to comply with an order from the country’s High Court.

alerts.title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts
alerts.summary: U.S. natural gas futures fell after weekend updates took some of the chill out of early February weather forecasts.

alerts.title: Commission Demography Report highlights the challenges and opportunities of Europe's demographic transformation
alerts.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 14 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission published its third report on demographic transformation in the EU, highlighting both the challenges and the opportunities it presents for competitiveness, innovation, social cohesion and sustainable development if addressed early and effectively.
alerts.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

alerts.title: Factsheet: Demographic transformation in the EU

alerts.title: Commission greenlights Cyprus's sixth payment request for €120 million under NextGenerationEU
alerts.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 13 Jul 2026 Today, the Commission positively assessed Cyprus's sixth payment request under the Recovery and Resilience Facility, the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU.
